subcodes.first_line: O luminous youth with merciful heart, I have inhaled the fragrance of thy love from those lands [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشاب النورانی ذا القلب الرحمانی انی استنشقت رائحه محبتک من تلک البلاد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
